def positive_tokenizer_encode_in_loop_without_cache():
    rule_id = "tokenizer_encode_in_loop_without_cache"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Tokenizer encode calls repeated inside loops without caching or batching signals."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
